# Sajhi Shiksha

Sajhi Shiksha is a free, open educational resource-sharing platform for KVS (Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan) students and teachers.

## What is Sajhi Shiksha?

A website that provides free access to study materials, question papers, assembly formats, government rule documents, and teacher-contributed resources for Classes 6-12. No login required.

## Key Features

- Free study materials for Classes 6-12
- Question papers and answer keys
- Morning assembly formats
- GOI/KVS rules and office formats
- Teacher-contributed resources
- Google Drive embedded viewing
- Search and filter functionality
- Mobile-friendly design

## Content Categories

1. Students: Official CBSE/NCERT resources and searchable question papers for Classes 6-12 Mathematics
2. Teachers (TGT/PGT Maths): Question papers, question banks, maths lab activities, holiday homework, lesson plans, PPTs/worksheets
3. Teachers (Circulars/Formats): GOI/KVS circulars, admission formats, time table software, CBSE/NIOS formats, morning assembly, office formats
4. Math Lovers: Olympiad resources, puzzles, maths project ideas, YouTube channels for math enthusiasts

## How to Contribute

Email resources to sajhishiksha@gmail.com with subject, class, and description.

## URL Structure

- Homepage: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/
- Students: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/for-students
- Teachers: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/for-teachers
- TGT/PGT Maths: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/for-teachers/tgt-pgt
- Circulars/Formats: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/for-teachers/circular-formats
- Math Lovers: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/for-math-lovers
- Search: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/search
- Contribute: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/contribute
- About: https://www.sajhishiksha.in/about
